Keto Restaurants in Clermont

The cleanest of Clermont's restaurants with keto options is RUBY TUESDAY 7432, 95/100 at its last inspection. Here are all 11, each graded A–F so you can compare the kitchen, not just the menu.

11 keto restaurants

  • A 95 R
    RUBY TUESDAY 7432 American ★ 4.2 (3062) Clermont · Lake County VeganVeg +2 more Inspected Apr 2026
  • A 94 P
    PDQ Other ★ 4.5 (2002) Clermont · Lake County DFKeto +2 more Inspected Oct 2025
  • A 93 T
    TEXAS ROADHOUSE American ★ 4.5 (4416) Clermont · Lake County DFKeto +1 more Inspected Mar 2026
  • A 92 G
    GATORS DOCKSIDE American ★ 3.8 (1519) Clermont · Lake County DFKeto +1 more Inspected May 2026

  • B 80 C

  • C 78 B
